name: SeleniumBase
tagline: All-in-one Python browser automation for testing, scraping, and stealth crawling
metaDescription: SeleniumBase is an open-source Python framework for browser automation, end-to-end web testing, and stealthy scraping, with a CDP Mode that gets past bot detection.
overview: SeleniumBase is an open-source Python framework that brings web testing, web crawling, scraping, and stealth automation together in one tool. You write Python scripts that drive a real Chromium browser, and the framework handles the setup, waiting, and driver management for you.

It runs on top of Selenium WebDriver and adds higher-level methods so your code stays short and readable. Most scripts can be run with pytest, pynose, or plain python, and a stealthy CDP Mode lets your browser sessions pass common bot-detection tests on sites that block normal automation.
features: CDP Mode: a stealthy Chromium automation mode that bypasses common bot-detection systems
Stealthy Playwright Mode that connects Playwright to a SeleniumBase browser session
High-level Python methods (open, find_elements, assert_element, and more) that reduce boilerplate over raw Selenium
Runs the same tests with pytest, pynose, or pure python, plus a Gherkin/behave BDD format
Command-line tools via the seleniumbase / sbase commands, including project scaffolding with sbase mkdir
Test reporting extras like HTML reports, a dashboard, screenshots, and a demo mode for visual stepping

gettingStarted.intro: SeleniumBase installs from PyPI with pip. Install the package, verify the command-line tool, then run a script with pytest or pure Python.

steps.heading: Install SeleniumBase
steps.body: Install the main framework from PyPI. Add Playwright too if you want the Stealthy Playwright integration.
steps.code:
pip install seleniumbase
pip install playwright

steps.heading: Verify the install
steps.body: Type seleniumbase or sbase to confirm the framework installed correctly and to see the available commands.

steps.heading: Run a stealthy CDP Mode script
steps.body: Pure CDP Mode (sb_cdp) opens a stealthy Chromium browser. This short script navigates to a bot-detection page and then quits.
steps.code:
from seleniumbase import sb_cdp

sb = sb_cdp.Chrome()
sb.goto("https://browserscan.net/bot-detection")
sb.sleep(3)
sb.quit()

steps.heading: Run a test with pytest
steps.body: Tests built on the BaseCase class run through pytest. Use the --demo flag to step through the actions visually.

useCases: Write end-to-end UI tests for web apps and run them with pytest, with HTML reports and a dashboard
Scrape data from pages, such as collecting listing titles and links into a Python list
Crawl sites protected by bot-detection using the stealthy CDP Mode browser
Connect Playwright to a stealthy SeleniumBase session for automation that needs to look like a real user
